transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Robert Klein. I'm calling because my main sewer line has no hot water. Dispatcher: Hi Robert, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Bradford White, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 22 Oak Court. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out Saturday between 10 and 12. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.issue: main sewer line has no hot water
expected_entities.equipment: Bradford White main sewer line, an older one, 15 years
